title: CatchCombo [Cobblemon Addon]
description: Increases catch rate and Shiny spawn chances when catching the same Pokémon species consecutively.
body:
****CatchCombo** implements a streak mechanic to Cobblemon. Catching the same species of Pokémon repeatedly increases your catch rate multiplier and Shiny spawn chance for that specific species.**

**How it works:**

- Chaining: Your combo counter goes up every time you capture the same pokémon in a row.

- Reset: Catching a different pokémon resets the combo to zero.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5a726893f5ff920f8ac032d3ede68d187a933a0.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95c7f852ffbd72075da6728cd8af46db7f39d78f.png)

**Spawn Boost:** When a Pokémon spawns nearby, if you have a high combo for that species, the mod attempts to force it to be Shiny.
Catch Rate Thresholds: The mod applies the following multipliers to your capture chance based on your current combo:

- 5+ catches: 1.5x Catch Rate
- 11+ catches: 2.0x Catch Rate
- 21+ catches: 2.5x Catch Rate
- 31+ catches: 3.0x Catch Rate (Max)

**Shiny Chance Thresholds:** High combos dramatically increase the chance of finding a Shiny by granting extra spawn attempts. The percentages represent the approximate chance for a Shiny spawn:

- 0-10 catches: ~0.024% (Standard)
- 11+ catches: ~0.12% 
- 21+ catches: ~0.22% 
- 31+ catches: ~0.32% (Max Bonus)
